name: adobe-app-builder-llm-app-boilerplate
description: Adobe App Builder boilerplate: streaming chat, REST tool actions, MCP (Streamable HTTP) for ChatGPT-style hosts, and a React SPA with a shared UI-block contract.

scripts.preapp:dev: npm run clean:web-src-dist && npm run sync:web-actions-base
scripts.preapp:build: npm run clean:web-src-dist && npm run sync:web-actions-base
